name: French Onion Soup - with Coke
recipeIngredient: French bread, cut into thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter/margarine.
2. Add onions and cook until they are golden, do not brown.
3. Add undiluted beef broth (use 1 can), water, Coca-Cola, salt, vinegar, and pepper to taste. Cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
4. In a broiler, toast one side of the French bread slices. Turn and generously sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
5. Toast until browned.
6. Serve hot, ladling soup into deep bowls and topping each serving with the toasted bread, cheese-side up.
Makes 4 servings or about 6 cups.
